test.command: cd /Users/ashishhuddar/scopepm/packages/api && bun run test && cd /Users/ashishhuddar/scopepm/packages/web && bun run test

lint.command: Not configured in .factory/services.yaml (project has no ESLint setup; lint validation skipped)

blockingIssues.description: `packages/api/src/__tests__/auth-middleware.test.ts` checks `/api/me` by mounting a copied stand-in handler instead of exercising the real endpoint in `packages/api/src/index.ts`, so the required unauthorized `/api/me` coverage can pass even if the actual app route regresses.

`packages/web/app/__tests__/routes/dashboard.test.tsx` still contains a silent-pass path (`expect(mockNavigate).toBeDefined()` and return) that lets the dashboard auth-guard test succeed without rendering the route component or asserting the redirect/loading behavior, so the requested dashboard-route coverage is not reliable.

nonBlockingIssues.description: `packages/api/src/__tests__/waitlist.test.ts` replaces the exported `waitlist` schema with a plain object, so the suite would still pass if the route queried the wrong table or column.
The PUT success case in `packages/api/src/__tests__/projects.test.ts` posts both `name` and `description` but only asserts the updated `name`, leaving the returned `description` unverified.

The updated dashboard auth-guard test still has a fallback branch that can pass without rendering `DashboardLayout`, which weakens the value of the fixed test even though the import/typecheck problem is resolved.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to document that `/api/me` lives in `packages/api/src/index.ts`, so tests for that endpoint should exercise the real app entry rather than a copied handler.
Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to note that TanStack route modules export a named `Route` binding and route-focused tests should import `{ Route }` instead of assuming a default export.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document realistic Drizzle mocking patterns for API route tests, including how to mock schema/table exports and how to model mixed chained selects (for example a reusable `makeFromSequence` helper) without depending on undefined column references.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The waitlist/onboarding review found `packages/api/src/__tests__/waitlist.test.ts` fell back to a `{}` table mock because the skill only says to mock the database layer, and the projects review introduced `makeFromSequence(...)` in `packages/api/src/__tests__/projects.test.ts` to cover mixed `where()` / `where().orderBy()` chains without any prior guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how to test app-level endpoints that live in `packages/api/src/index.ts` (such as `/api/me`) so workers exercise the real app entry instead of copying handlers into test files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `api-tests-specs-auth-health` review found `packages/api/src/__tests__/auth-middleware.test.ts` duplicated a simplified `/api/me` route instead of hitting the real handler in `packages/api/src/index.ts:71-90`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require `typecheck:web` alongside `bun run test` before finalizing web-test features so type-invalid imports and route-module assumptions are caught during the feature, not by follow-up cleanup work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `web-tests-components-routes` review found the original dashboard suite shipped a type-invalid `../../routes/dashboard?t=1` import that only surfaced later; `.factory/services.yaml` already defines `typecheck:web`, but the skill only requires test runs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Route tests should assert real route behavior and avoid fallback branches that pass without rendering the route component or checking navigation side effects.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `web-tests-components-routes` review found `packages/web/app/__tests__/routes/dashboard.test.tsx` could pass via a silent `expect(mockNavigate).toBeDefined()` branch, and the `fix-dashboard-test-import` review confirmed that fallback remains after the import fix.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the preferred placement for web component tests under `packages/web/app/__tests__` to avoid duplicate suites like the existing root-level `hero.test.tsx` and the later `components/Hero.test.tsx` copy.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `web-tests-components-routes` review found the repo already had `packages/web/app/__tests__/hero.test.tsx`, but the feature added `packages/web/app/__tests__/components/Hero.test.tsx` with effectively the same assertions because no placement convention is documented.
